appDesc.message: E busetsa YouTube mo sebopegong sa yone sa bogologolo (pele ga dikhutlo tsotlhe tse di dikologileng le dilo tse di sa ratweng tse di fitlhegileng) + e kaela gape YouTube Shorts + diphasalatso tsa thumbnail

mode_restoreDislikes.message: Tsosolosa Dilo tse O sa di Rateng

mode_playablesBlock.message: Go Fitlha Dilo tse di Tshamekang

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Bontsha dipalo tse di sa rateng o dirisa tshedimosetso ya Return YouTube Dislike

helptip_unroundCorners.message: Go dikologa dikhutlo go dikologa dikarolo tsa UI

helptip_disableShorts.message: Rulaganya Dikhutshwane mo setshameking se segolo sa bogologolo

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Hide Shorts gore e seka ya tlhaga mo tsebeng ya kwa gae + dipholo

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Go fitlha Dilo tsa go Tshameka gore di seka tsa tlhaga mo tsebeng ya kwa gae

helptip_adBlock.message: Go fitlha ditshwantsho tsa diphasalatso mo dipopegong tsa tsebe ya kwa gae

helptip_aiBlock.message: Go fitlha dilo tsa AI mo ditsebeng tsa gae + tsa bidio

helptip_idlePrevention.message: E thibela tab gore e seka ya robala

helptip_notifDisabled.message: Bontsha dikitsiso fa o toggling mode/settings
